text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has released footage alleging that Hezbollah uses ambulances and medical equipment to conceal activities, including alleged transfer of weapons and members. The IDF claims that as evacuation efforts in southern Lebanon have made it harder for Hezbollah to move, the group has increased its use of ambulances to transport members while hiding their identities. During operations in the Qantara area, the IDF claimed troops allegedly found an ambulance containing explosives, mortar shells, ammunition and a grenade. In another incident, an alleged Hezbollah member was killed near an ambulance that was allegedly later found to contain weapons. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方发布了一段视频，声称真主党利用救护车和医疗设备掩盖其活动，包括涉嫌转移武器和人员。以色列国防军（IDF）称，由于黎巴嫩南部的撤离行动使真主党更难移动，该组织增加了使用救护车运送人员并隐藏其身份的行为。在坎塔拉（Qantara）地区的行动中，以军声称部队在一辆救护车中发现了爆炸物、迫击炮弹、弹药和一枚手榴弹。在另一起事件中，一名涉嫌真主党成员在救护车附近被击毙，据称该救护车后来被发现装有武器。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli Hermes-450 drone was shot down over the Tyre area in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The moment it was shot down. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 一架以色列赫尔墨斯-450（Hermes-450）无人机在黎巴嫩南部提尔（Tyre）地区上空被击落。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 被击落的瞬间。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg : The White House has extended a Jones Act shipping waiver by 90 days to mid‑August, allowing foreign‑flagged vessels to move oil, fuel and fertiliser between U.S. ports. The waiver, originally set to expire on 17 May, is designed to ease supply disruptions caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz after the outbreak of the Iran war. It covers coal, crude oil, refined products, LNG and fertiliser. Critics said the extension undermines American shipbuilding and the Jones Act’s purpose. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：白宫已将《琼斯法案》（Jones Act）航运豁免期延长90天至5月中旬，允许悬挂外国旗帜的船只在美国港口之间运输石油、燃料和化肥。该豁免原定于5月17日到期，旨在缓解因伊朗战争爆发后霍尔木兹海峡关闭而导致的供应中断。豁免范围涵盖煤炭、原油、成品油、液化天然气（LNG）和化肥。批评人士称，此举削弱了美国造船业和《琼斯法案》的宗旨。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 Netanyahu has published his annual medical report today. He says he is healthy, in excellent physical condition, and recently overcame a minor prostate issue. During routine follow-up after surgery for an enlarged benign prostate around a year and a…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The judges in Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s trial have approved his request to cancel this week’s hearings due to his prostate surgery. The operation will begin after 4pm at Hadassah Ein Kerem Hospital in Jerusalem. Netanyahu is expected to remain hospitalised for several days. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱 内塔尼亚胡今天发布了他的年度医疗报告。他表示自己身体健康，身体状况极佳，最近克服了一个轻微的前列腺问题。在去年左右因良性前列腺增生手术后的常规随访期间……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡审判案的法官已批准他因前列腺手术取消本周听证会的请求。手术将于下午4点后在耶路撒冷的哈达萨艾因凯雷姆医院（Hadassah Ein Kerem Hospital）开始。预计内塔尼亚胡将住院数日。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: "It’s important to remember that Article 2 of the association agreement between the European Union and Israel is about respecting international law and humanitarian law. And clearly, neither in Lebanon, nor in the West Bank, nor in Gaza, is Israel respecting it. And this must lead us to reflection and also to action." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：“重要的是要记住，欧盟与以色列结盟协议的第2条是关于尊重国际法和人道主义法的。显然，无论是在黎巴嫩、西岸还是加沙，以色列都没有尊重这一点。这必须促使我们进行反思，并采取行动。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Commander of the IRGC's Ground Forces, Mohammad Karami: The people, the government, and the armed forces are united in confronting the enemy Those who say "We are all Iranians and revolutionaries," with an iron will, unwavering determination, and obedience to the Supreme Leader, will make the criminal enemy regret it tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊斯兰革命卫队地面部队指挥官穆罕默德·卡拉米（Mohammad Karami）：人民、政府和武装部队团结一致对抗敌人。那些怀着钢铁般的意志、坚定的决心和对最高领袖的服从，高呼“我们都是伊朗人和革命者”的人，将让犯罪的敌人感到后悔。 推文

text: Open Source Intel China blocked exports of dual-use goods to seven European firms, including Hensoldt and FN Browning, over links to Taiwan cooperation, and banned re-exports of Chinese components to them. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047630813760553309/photo/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor Reuters reports an internal Pentagon email outlined options to punish NATO allies that didn’t back the Iran war, including suspending roles for countries like Spain and reconsidering support for key territorial claims, underscoring rising tensions inside the alliance. Fracturing NATO over this would play directly into Russia’s long-standing goal of dividing the alliance. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 路透社报道称，一份五角大楼内部电子邮件概述了惩罚不支持伊朗战争的北约盟国的选项，包括暂停西班牙等国的作用，并重新考虑对关键领土主张的支持，这凸显了联盟内部日益加剧的紧张局势。因这一问题导致北约分裂，将直接符合俄罗斯长期以来分裂该联盟的目标。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Macron says he will not stay in politics after his term ends in 2027: "I didn't do politics before, I won't do it after." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047629850215616743/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Israeli PM Netanyahu said his medical report shows he is in good health and strong condition, adding a small early-stage prostate tumor was fully treated with no spread and is now gone. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047629273628827916/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Residents in northern Israel near the Lebanon border say their security is now being placed in U.S. hands after President Trump extended the truce for another 3 weeks. - YNET https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047629150052130854/photo/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @GitaGopinath : The UAE exploring a swap line with the US should give us pause that the consequences of the Iran conflict are far greater than what we see priced in markets. Such explorations do not arise lightly, even behind closed doors. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @GitaGopinath：阿联酋正在探索与美国的互换额度，这应该让我们停下来思考，伊朗冲突的后果远比我们在市场上看到的定价要严重得多。即使在闭门造车的情况下，这种探索也不会轻易出现。 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Неофициальный Безсонов: #НашиРебята Очень героический человек Алексей «Белорус», начальник службы БПЛА 110-й бригады. Приехал воевать за Донбасс задолго до начала СВО. Его история сочетает в себе мужество, тяготы войны, освоение новой техники в борьбе за господство в воздухе и поддержку близких. Военкор Дмитрий Астрахань отмечает роль Белоруса в установлении стандартов применения БПЛА в ходе СВО. Это история о единстве фронта и тыла, цене мира, духе и влиянии технологий на поле боя. Облегченная версия.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Неофициальный Безсонов：#我们的战士 阿列克谢“白俄罗斯”（Alexey “Belarus”），第110旅无人机服务部门负责人，是一位非常英勇的人。他在特别军事行动开始前很久就来到这里为顿巴斯而战。他的故事结合了勇气、战争的艰辛、在争夺制空权的斗争中掌握新技术以及亲人的支持。战地记者德米特里·阿斯特拉罕（Dmitry Astrakhan）指出了“白俄罗斯”在确立特别军事行动期间无人机使用标准方面的作用。这是一个关于前线与后方团结、和平代价、精神以及技术对战场影响的故事。精简版。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇰🇳 The Ukrainian Sea Port Authority reports commercial vessel moving through the Ukrainian maritime corridor under the flag of Saint Kitts and Nevis was struck by two drones while en route to one of the ports of Greater Odesa A fire broke out on board following the strike but was extinguished by the crew. There are no reports of casualties nor has the origin of the drones been confirmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇰🇳 乌克兰海港管理局报告称，一艘悬挂圣基茨和尼维斯国旗、正经由乌克兰海上走廊前往大敖德萨地区港口的商船遭到两架无人机袭击。袭击发生后船上起火，但已被船员扑灭。目前没有人员伤亡报告，无人机的来源也尚未得到证实。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF reports 3 Israeli soldiers were injured this morning in an operational accident after a vehicle rolled over in southern Lebanon. 2 soldiers were moderately wounded and one lightly. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军报告称，今天上午在黎巴嫩南部发生一起车辆侧翻的操作事故，导致3名以色列士兵受伤。其中2名士兵中度受伤，1名轻伤。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 From PSYOP to MindWar: The Psychology of Victory “MindWar is the deliberate, aggressive convincing of all participants in a war that we will win that war.” Footage: blunts4jesus 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 从心理战到思维战：胜利的心理学 “思维战是蓄意且积极地让战争中的所有参与者相信我们将赢得这场战争。” 视频来源：blunts4jesus 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡ 🇬🇫 🇫🇷 🇷🇺 The Soyuz launch pad of the French Guyana space center was demolished yesterday. The site was inactive since 2022 when European and Russian space programs broke ties. The launch site will now be operated by MaiaSpace, a subsidiary of ArianeGroup and will be used to eventually launch miniature rockets to low-earth orbit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇬🇫 🇫🇷 🇷🇺 法属圭亚那航天中心的联盟号发射台昨天被拆除。该地点自2022年欧洲和俄罗斯航天计划断绝关系以来一直处于闲置状态。该发射场现在将由阿丽亚娜集团的子公司MaiaSpace运营，并将最终用于发射微型火箭进入近地轨道。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Netanyahu has published his annual medical report today. He says he is healthy, in excellent physical condition, and recently overcame a minor prostate issue. During routine follow-up after surgery for an enlarged benign prostate around a year and a half ago, doctors found a tiny spot under 1 cm that was identified as a very early-stage malignant tumor with no spread or metastasis. Doctors offered monitoring or treatment, and he chose immediate action. Netanyahu underwent several short focused treatments, continued working throughout, and the spot was completely removed. He thanked the medical teams at Hadassah Hospital in Jerusalem and urged Israelis to protect their health, get checked, and follow doctors’ advice. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 内塔尼亚胡今天发布了他的年度医疗报告。他表示自己身体健康，身体状况极佳，最近克服了一个轻微的前列腺问题。在大约一年半前因良性前列腺增生进行手术后的常规随访中，医生发现了一个小于1厘米的微小斑点，被鉴定为极早期的恶性肿瘤，没有扩散或转移。医生提供了监测或治疗方案，他选择了立即采取行动。内塔尼亚胡接受了几次短期的重点治疗，期间一直坚持工作，该斑点已被完全切除。他感谢了耶路撒冷哈达萨医院的医疗团队，并敦促以色列人保护自己的健康，进行检查并听从医生的建议。 @wfwitness

text: Argentina’s economy fell 2.6% in Feb 2026 (worst drop since late 2023) and down 2.1% vs last year.
text_zh: 阿根廷经济在2026年2月下降了2.6%（为2023年底以来的最大跌幅），同比下降2.1%。

text: Germany’s state of Hesse proposes a law to criminalize "denying Israel’s right to exist", with penalties of up to 5 years in prison.
text_zh: 德国黑森州提议立法将“否认以色列生存权”定为刑事犯罪，最高可判处5年监禁。

text: OSINTtechnical An email circling the Pentagon outlines options for the US to punish NATO allies that failed to support the war against Iran -Reuters Options include suspending Spain from the alliance and reviewing the U.S. position on Britain's claim to the Falkland Islands. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 一封在五角大楼流传的电子邮件概述了美国惩罚那些不支持对伊朗战争的北约盟国的选项——路透社。选项包括暂停西班牙的北约成员国资格，并重新审视美国对英国福克兰群岛主权主张的立场。推文

text: Open Source Intel A guy made $36,900 on Polymarket by walking up to the weather sensor the platform was using, an unguarded thermometer near a Paris airport runway, and pointing a hairdryer at it. Entered with $2,000 at 5 cents. Bought YES on temperature targets. Heated the sensor. Collected his winnings. Ran. The meteorological service launched an investigation. The sensor now has a security guard. The guy is gone. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一名男子在Polymarket上赚了36,900美元，方法是走到该平台使用的天气传感器（巴黎机场跑道附近一个无人看管的温度计）前，用吹风机对着它吹。他以5美分的价格投入了2,000美元，买入温度目标“是”。加热了传感器。领取了奖金。跑了。气象部门展开了调查。该传感器现在有保安看守。那个人已经不见了。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @StratcomCentre : As the Russian government organizes military recruiting drives at universities across the country, Ukrainian soldiers infiltrated one to explain what awaits any Russians unlucky enough to join up. https://twitter.com/StratcomCentre/status/2047620077906718931/video/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @APHClarkson : Europe has via Norway and NL domestic production alongside direct access to North African sources in the way Japan does not. Interesting that Japan has more strategic petroleum reserves than all of Europe. https://twitter.com/LynAldenContact/status/2047389500813312210/photo/1 - Lyn Alden tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @APHClarkson : 欧洲通过挪威和荷兰的国内生产以及直接获取北非资源，拥有日本所不具备的渠道。有趣的是，日本的战略石油储备比整个欧洲还要多。 https://twitter.com/LynAldenContact/status/2047389500813312210/photo/1 - Lyn Alden 推文

text: OSINTdefender Three carrier strike groups are in the Middle East for the first time since the start of Operation Iraqi Freedom in 2003. The USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72), USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78), and USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) are now all operating in the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) area of responsibility, as tensions between the U.S. and Iran move closer to the threshold of a resumption of open conflict. Per a CENTCOM release, the combined deployment consists of 15,000 Marines and sailors. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 自2003年“伊拉克自由行动”开始以来，三个航母打击群首次同时出现在中东地区。“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号（CVN 72）、“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号（CVN 78）和“乔治·H·W·布什”号（CVN 77）目前都在美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）的责任区内行动，因为美国和伊朗之间的紧张局势正接近恢复公开冲突的临界点。根据中央司令部的发布，此次联合部署包括15,000名海军陆战队员和水兵。推文

text: BREAKING: Netanyahu underwent surgery to remove a cancerous tumor. Netanyahu underwent a prostate surgery on Dec. 29, 2024. Follow-up MRI found a tiny suspicious finding under 1 cm, but additional tests showed no evidence of local recurrence or advanced prostate cancer. Doctors concluded he can continue with short and focused clinical monitoring only, after achieving full recovery.
text_zh: 突发：内塔尼亚胡接受了切除癌性肿瘤的手术。内塔尼亚胡于2024年12月29日接受了前列腺手术。后续核磁共振检查发现了一个小于1厘米的微小可疑发现，但额外检查显示没有局部复发或晚期前列腺癌的迹象。医生得出结论，他在完全康复后只需继续进行短期和重点的临床监测。

text: 🇨🇳 ❌ 🇪🇺 China’s Commerce Ministry said on April 24 it was banning exports of dual-use items to seven European entities over arms sales to Taiwan, placing them immediately on its export control list The entities, including German defence electronics firm Hensoldt and Belgian-based defence and sporting arms manufacturer FN Browning, have participated in arms sales to Taiwan or “colluded with Taiwan”, a commerce ministry spokesperson said in a statement. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 ❌ 🇪🇺 中国商务部4月24日表示，因向台湾出售武器，将禁止向七家欧洲实体出口两用物项，并将其立即列入出口管制清单。商务部发言人在声明中表示，这些实体包括德国国防电子公司Hensoldt和总部位于比利时的国防及运动武器制造商FN Browning，它们参与了对台军售或“与台湾勾结”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ЕВРОПАРЬ: 📝 Проверка на послушание 📝 В Пентагоне обсуждают , как надавить на союзников по НАТО, которые не поддержали США в войне против Ирана. В этом контексте, по данным СМИ, среди вариантов фигурирует и приостановка членства Испании в альянсе. Кроме того, в списке пересмотр американской позиции по Фолклендам и недопуск «проблемных» стран к важным постам в НАТО. 🖍 Испания стала удобной мишенью не случайно. В Мадриде публично отказались поддерживать удары по Ирану и не дали использовать свои базы для наступательной операции, ссылаясь на международное право и опасность новой войны на Ближнем Востоке. Но здесь важнее даже не судьба испанцев, тем более что неясно, существует ли вообще процедура такой «приостановки» . 📌 Куда показательнее сам подход : в американской администрации стремятся «ослабить ощущение привилегированности у европейцев» и превратить зависимость Европы в механизм политического принуждения. В этом смысле НАТО нужен главным образом для того, чтобы заставлять союзников обслуживать внешние кампании Вашингтона, и речь идёт не о коллективной безопасности , а о системе подчинения, которая утрачивает даже прежнюю дипломатическую упаковку. #Испания #НАТО #США 👁 @evropar — на пороге смерти Европы 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ЕВРОПАРЬ: 📝 服从性测试 📝 五角大楼正在讨论如何向那些不支持美国对伊朗战争的北约盟国施压。在此背景下，据媒体报道，选项中包括暂停西班牙在联盟中的成员资格。此外，名单中还包括重新审视美国在福克兰群岛问题上的立场，以及禁止“有问题”的国家担任北约重要职务。 🖍 西班牙成为方便的目标并非偶然。马德里公开拒绝支持对伊朗的打击，并以国际法和中东爆发新战争的危险为由，拒绝让美国使用其基地进行进攻性行动。但这里更重要的甚至不是西班牙人的命运，况且目前尚不清楚是否存在这种“暂停”程序。 📌 更能说明问题的是这种做法本身：美国政府试图“削弱欧洲人的特权感”，并将欧洲的依赖转化为政治胁迫的机制。从这个意义上说，北约的主要目的是迫使盟国服务于华盛顿的外部行动，这谈不上集体安全，而是一个正在失去外交包装的从属体系。 #西班牙 #北约 #美国 👁 @evropar — 在欧洲死亡的边缘 💸 支持我们

text: 🇷🇺 Russia's Central Bank lowered the key rate to 14.5% from 15% per annum. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯央行将基准利率从年化15%下调至14.5%。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Macron says he won’t stay in politics after 2027: I didn’t do politics before, I won’t do it after.
text_zh: 马克龙表示2027年后他将不再从政：我以前没搞过政治，以后也不会。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇩 🇱🇧 UNIFIL announced that an Indonesian peacekeeper, Corporal Rico Pramudia, has died of injuries sustained in a projectile explosion at his base in Adchit Al Qusayr on 29 March. The 31‑year‑old succumbed to his wounds at a hospital in Beirut. UNIFIL demanded that all actors uphold their obligations under international law and ensure the safety of UN personnel. Deliberate attacks on peacekeepers are grave violations of international humanitarian law and Security Council Resolution 1701, and may amount to war crimes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇩 🇱🇧 联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）宣布，一名印尼维和人员Rico Pramudia下士因3月29日在阿德奇特-库赛尔（Adchit Al Qusayr）基地发生的炮弹爆炸中受伤，最终不治身亡。这名31岁的维和人员在贝鲁特的一家医院伤重不治。联黎部队要求所有相关方履行国际法义务，确保联合国人员的安全。蓄意攻击维和人员是严重违反国际人道法和安理会第1701号决议的行为，可能构成战争罪。@wfwitness

text: China has blocked exports of “dual-use” goods (civilian and military) to seven European companies, including Germany’s Hensoldt and Belgium’s FN Browning, citing their links to Taiwan arms cooperation. The ban also stops third parties from re-exporting Chinese components to these firms.
text_zh: 中国已禁止向七家欧洲公司出口“军民两用”商品，其中包括德国的亨索尔特（Hensoldt）和比利时的FN勃朗宁（FN Browning），理由是它们与台湾有武器合作关系。该禁令还禁止第三方将中国零部件转口给这些公司。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇲 🇮🇷 Reuters: The oil tanker HELGA, sailing under the flag of Comoros, has arrived at one of the offshore oil loading terminals in Iraq's southern Basra port to load 2 million barrels of crude. The vessel is the second tanker to reach Basra's southern offshore terminals since the closure of the Strait of Hormuz during the Iran war, with the Malta-flagged tanker Agios Fanourios I being the first to load about 2 million barrels of Basra crude earlier this month. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇲 🇮🇷 路透社：悬挂科摩罗国旗的油轮“HELGA”号已抵达伊拉克南部巴士拉港的一个海上石油装载终端，准备装载200万桶原油。这是自伊朗战争期间霍尔木兹海峡关闭以来，第二艘抵达巴士拉南部海上终端的油轮。本月早些时候，悬挂马耳他国旗的“Agios Fanourios I”号油轮是第一艘装载约200万桶巴士拉原油的油轮。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Three US aircraft carriers operating simultaneously in West Asia for the first time in decades — CENTCOM 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 数十年来首次有三艘美国航空母舰同时在西亚地区行动 — 中央司令部 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇨🇳🇯🇵 Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun has strongly condemned Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's visits to the Yasukuni shrine, calling the moves "a blatant provocation against international justice." Guo said Japan has "refused to…" ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Asked whether Chinese diplomacy played a role in the extension of the US-Iran ceasefire, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun said China supports all political and diplomatic efforts to achieve "a full and lasting ceasefire" in the Middle East, and stands ready to play "an active and constructive role." Separately, asked about Trump's suggestion that a US-intercepted Iranian vessel may have carried a "gift from China," Guo said China "has always been a role model in performing its due international obligations" and declined to elaborate further. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇨🇳🇯🇵 中国外交部发言人郭家坤强烈谴责日本首相高市早苗参拜靖国神社，称此举是‘对国际正义的公然挑衅’。郭表示，日本‘拒绝……’” ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在被问及中国外交在延长美伊停火协议中是否发挥了作用时，中国外交部发言人郭家坤表示，中国支持所有旨在实现中东“全面持久停火”的政治和外交努力，并随时准备发挥“积极和建设性的作用”。另外，在被问及特朗普关于美国拦截的一艘伊朗船只可能载有“来自中国的礼物”的说法时，郭表示，中国“在履行应尽的国际义务方面一直是典范”，并拒绝进一步置评。@wfwitness

text: Pope Leo XIV on migration: I would change the question: what is the Global North doing to help the Global South in the situation that forces them to migrate?
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世谈移民问题：我会改变这个问题：全球北方国家在帮助全球南方国家解决迫使他们移民的局势方面做了什么？
